notes: Acted-as-LLM (Claude Opus 4.7 in-session) for POC and query synthesis; in D3-main these become API calls.
POC reused the rep3-work scaffold (deterministic compilation of the bf4a9b2467b7 patch into the C1 two-function _buggy/_fixed schema); chmod 444 + sha256 logged before any further stage.

poc-for-verifier.c (seed slice) was regenerated to include both _buggy and _fixed mirrors so verifier-v1 count-equality holds; first verifier run with the prior single-function slice mismatched on F1.acquire/F1.release/F5.return/F2.if due to v1's documented whole-file counting weakness.
Verifier-v1 strict-passed on the symmetric slice (acquire 2/2, release 2/2, goto 0/0, return 9/9, if 4/4).

Single compile+analyze round: query compiled clean and oracle-passed on first try (fired on POC.c:84 inside aries_audio_probe_buggy with leakingRet pointing at the IS_ERR early return; silent inside aries_audio_probe_fixed where of_node_put precedes the IS_ERR check).
POC sha verified unchanged after Stage F (no drift).
